entries.value: A 64 by 48 safe, noncombat nexus with five enabled Core stations and no hostile, damage, projectile, pickup, or drop creation.
Lantern Halls
A safe five-tile-radius rest landmark on the Core microrealm road.
Lantern Fork
The walkable arrival landmark occupying x 4 through 13 and y 38 through 47.
Realm Gate
The Bell Sepulcher entrance, available only after the private microrealm reaches Cleared.
Bell Sepulcher
A safe-transfer return to Lantern Halls at the Core microrealm Realm Gate.
Lantern Halls
The nonvisual Lantern Halls return anchor used by a living safe character returning from character select.
Character Select Return
The Core memorial station at 10, 10; its interaction remains integration-gated until permanent death is durable.
Memorial Wall
The Core Oath station at 24, 18; its interaction remains integration-gated until Oath mutations are durable.
Oath Shrine
The Core Overflow station at 15, 38; its interaction remains integration-gated until item storage is durable.
Overflow
The instant Core realm-entry station at 32, 3; admission remains integration-gated.
Realm Gate
The Core Vault station at 10, 38; its interaction remains integration-gated until item storage is durable.
Vault
A private capacity-one 48 by 48 clear-mud microrealm whose road connects the Realm Gate, Lantern Fork, and Bell portal.
Core Microrealm 01
